taxonomy: Pagiantha subglobosa is classified as a species of orchid in the genus Pagiantha. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. Within the Orchidaceae family, Pagiantha subglobosa is placed in the subtribe Coelogyneinae. This subtribe consists of epiphytic orchids, which are plants that grow on other plants, typically trees. The classification of Pagiantha subglobosa is further supported by its morphological characteristics, such as its flower structure and leaf shape.
